_doc: Curated EDITORIAL verdicts for rows whose taxonomy is a human judgment, not a structured fact. STATUS.csv lumps these under 'visual_only'; the metric_safe rows are NOT here (those are derived structurally from verified_shipped / layout_proven_all_faces). This file owns ONLY the public verdict; the importer attaches gates/candidate/advance/provenance mechanically from structured sources (apryse summary, curated scorecard). A row here is only emitted if a structured advance measurement exists for it.

aptos.rationale: No open metric clone; the closest open font reflows. Customer-supplied first, else a reported visual fallback.

consolas.rationale: Monospace cell-width match only (single advance ratio), not shape-proven; no italic face.

lucida-console.rationale: Monospace cell-width match only; not shape/code-font proven.

comic-sans-ms.rationale: Category-correct visual fallback; advance too far for metric fidelity.

verdana.rationale: Category visual fallback; fails worst-case advance.

candara.rationale: Category visual fallback; fails worst-case advance.

corbel.rationale: Category visual fallback; fails worst-case advance.
